step_rationale: Calprotectin subunit; DAMP and plaque-instability marker; infarct wall thinning promoter.
mechanism: S100A8 (calprotectin) drives sterile inflammation and thromboinflammation in acute MI, promoting infarct wall thinning and adverse remodeling.
